parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "model": "qwen/qwen3-30b",
  "messages": [
    {
      "role": "system",
      "content": "You are a health insurance claims extraction specialist. Extract all fields from the claim document below. Return ONLY a valid JSON object — no explanation, no markdown fences, no extra text.

Required JSON schema (exact field names):
{
  "policy_id": "string",
  "insured_id": "string",
  "period": integer,
  "premium_eur": float,
  "cost_claims_eur": float,
  "n_medical_services": integer,
  "patient_age": integer,
  "patient_gender": "M" or "F",
  "policy_type": "Individual" or "Corporate",
  "product_type": "Standard" or "Premium" or "Dental" or "International",
  "reimbursement_model": "reimbursement model" or "direct billing",
  "loss_ratio": float (compute: cost_claims_eur / premium_eur),
  "health_cluster": "H1" to "H6",
  "coverage_tier": "C1" to "C6",
  "policy_status": "new" or "active" or "lapsed",
  "risk_flag": "HIGH" if loss_ratio>1.5 or services>80, "MEDIUM" if 0.8-1.5, else "LOW",
  "anomaly_reason": "string describing why HIGH risk" or null
}"
    },
    {
      "role": "user",
      "content": "DOCUMENT:

{{ $json.messy_text }}

Extract all fields now:"
    }
  ],
  "temperature": 0,
  "max_tokens": 700,
  "response_format": { "type": "json_object" }
}
